---
title: "The genus <i>Oryctanthus</i> (Loranthaceae) in Colombia"
type: "article"
author:
  - name: "**Isabel Carmona-Gallego**"
    orcid: 0000-0001-8954-4503
    url: /people/carmona-gallego_isabel/index.qmd
  - name: "**Jhon Steven Murillo-Serna**"
    orcid: 0000-0003-4512-5811
    url: /people/murillo-serna_jhon-steven/index.qmd
  - name: "Claudenir Simões Caires"
  - name: "**Francisco Javier Roldán-Palacio**"
    orcid: 0000-0001-9241-9551
    url: /people/roldan-palacio_francisco-javier/index.qmd
  - name: "**Fernando Alveiro Alzate-Guarin**"
    orcid: 0000-0002-4916-8897
    url: /people/alzate-guarin_fernando-alveiro/index.qmd
year: 2026
date: 2026-06-02
publication: "Brittonia"
doi: https://doi.org/10.1007/s12228-026-09884-z
materials: ""

categories:
  - Flora of Colombia
  - Hemiparasitic
  - Host range
  - Mistletoe
  - Santalales
---

## Abstract

A revision and identification key for the eleven Colombian species of the
mistletoe genus *Oryctanthus* (Loranthaceae) are presented here. Relevant
characters to identify specimens, taxon diagnoses, and a list of reported hosts
for these hemipa- rasitic species is provided. Taxonomic affinities and
geographic distributions for each species are presented and discussed.

## Citation

> Carmona-Gallego, I., Murillo-Serna, J. S., Caires, C. S., Roldán-Palacio, F.
> J., & Alzate-Guarín, F. A. (2026). The genus *Oryctanthus* (Loranthaceae) in
> Colombia. *Brittonia*. https://doi.org/10.1007/s12228-026-09884-z
